titleStmt.title: SII 11.121: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 121. (A.R. No. 431 of 1926.) AMMINBHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE CEILING OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE JAIN BASTI.

summary.p: This damaged inscription purports to belong to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and refers to his subordinate Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jayakēśidēva, who was then ruling over Koṅkaṇa Nine-Hundred, Palasige Twelve-Thousand and Kundūr Five-Hundred from his capital at Gōvage (Goa). It seems to record the foundation of a Śiva temple at Ammayanabhāvi, an agrahāra in Kundūr-nāḍu and registers a gift of rice made for offerings in the temple by Māchiya[ṇṇa] and others.

The record is dated Śaka 993, Virōdhakṛit, • • • •, paṁchamī, Sunday, vyatīpāta. The month is lost. During the year, pañchamī combined with Sunday on the following occasions:— (1) Jyēshṭha, ba. 5 = May 22, A.D. 1071. (2) Āshāḍha, śu. 5 = June 5, A.D. 1071. (3) Nija-Āśvina, ba. 5 = October 16, A.D. 1071. (4) Kārttika, śu. 5 = October 30, A.D. 1071. (5) Phālguṇa, śu. 5 = February 26, A.D. 1071. and (6) Phālguṇa, ba. 5 = March 11, A.D. 1072.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabha ṭṭārakaṁ
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāśaba mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ śrīmajjayakēsidēva rkoṁkaṇavoṁbhaynūru
maṁ palasige pannirccāsiramumaṁ kuṁdūrainūrumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷa
naṁgeydu nijarājadhāni gōvageyo ḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . kaṁda .
jaḷanidhiparivṛtadharaṇiga sale kuṁdūrnnāḍu vadanadaṁtirppudu tallalanege lalāṭatiḷakaṁ bōlippa(ṁ)
mmayanabhāvi yalliyavipur . vacana . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnā nuṣṭhā
ṇaparāyaṇajapasamādhisīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmadagrahāra vammayanabhāvi yūro
ḍeyapramukha nālnūrvvarmmahājanada sannidhiyoḷu . v® . Ajanentante matapu
yukta rinaneṁtaṁ tujvaḷar śaṁkarātmajaneṁtantire dānigaḷu dhanadaneṁtantartthasaṁyukta raṁgajane ntante su
rūpigaḷu śivapadāṁbhōjātaṣaṭpādareṁdu janaṁ baṇnisuguṁ guṇāgraṇigaḷaṁ śrīsā
rvvaraṁ . kaṁ . Avaroḷu dēhārada nāgavarmma nagajādhināthapādāṁbhōjātavilīnaṣaṭpa daṁFrom this line
pāpavidūraṁ negardda nemaḷaguṇagaṇaniḷayaṁ . Ā nāgaṇnana tanayaṁ dānavinōdaṁ samastabudajana
�nīśānapadadvayabhaktaṁ mānavakuḷatiḷaka nāytavarmmaṁ negarddaṁ . parahitacaritaṁ sākṣarikara vaca
janajanamanōraṁjana nīśvarapadabhaktaṁ vaidyāṁburāsikuḷatiḷakanenisidaṁ bibbaṇnaṁ . Ātana di
magaṁ dhātrītaḷadoḷu bhūmidēvabhaktaṁ satyānvitaṁ samastadharmmasamētaṁ śiva dāsa
yyaṁ negarddaṁ . nijakuḷatiḷakaṁ pāpabrajaripu śivadharmmanirmmaḷaṁ śivapādāṁbujabhṛṁgaṁ su
sujanajanaṁ kāḷimayyanene meccadarār . vāravadhūjanamāraṁ mārāntakapadapayō
namaḷaṁ kāruṇyaparaṁ dharmmādhāraṁ bīraṇṇa nanyavanitādūraṁ guṇagaṇa niḷeyaṁ dharmma
cittu saucadāṇmaṁ sujanāgraṇiyene nagarddaṁ sale dhāriṇitaḷadoḷe māci ya
nīpēḷdērvvaru mūriṁ teṁkalondu śivagrihamaṁ vistaradiṁ māḍisi kuṁbhēsva
dharmmajñar . ṣaṭpada . harapādāṁbujabhṛṁgaṁ paranārījanadūraṁ
jātarūpaṁ sarasatigaṇabhakta narasaṁmmaṁ negarddha nī dharegallaṁ salisa
saṁsāraṁ sāramalteṁdaṟidumāguḍavve yanēka pratimegaḷiṁ mā
ke baṭṭe māca ṟadi . va . svasti sakakālaṁ 993 neya virōdhakritu saṁva
paṁcamiyoḷādityavāramuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍibaralke tatpuṇyadina doḷūri
nanivēdyagaṁdhadhūpadīpādyaṣṭavidhārccanege sālesāsirvvaravarige pratiyo
ḷokkalaloṁdu naḍeyisuvar . matta
du koḷagakkiyumoṁdu baḷḷaṁ moṁdu māneṇneyu maṁ salisu
ḷarāgalīyade nālnūrvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvar . kaṁ . Idaneyde kā
śatakōṭi hōmamaṁ vidhiyiṁ māḍida paḷamaneyduva rkkiḍisi darī
na gatiyoḷu . ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . kaṁ . dinapatiyuṁ śaśiyuṁ
mamararuṁ diggajamuṁ munigaḷu madrigaḷuṁ nilvinami
dharayoḷu . dharaṇīdēvakuḷāgraṇi gurubhaktaṁ māciya
sidaṁ sāhasamāgire paṇḍitapuṇḍarīkavanamārttaṇḍaṁ . guru
rāṁganāsūnu vara resida nī sāsana
sarasvatīgaṇanā bēṟūra māṟalu banda kuṁ
vendu mēlu ndu mēlu galanumaṁ dēvare
sālesāsirvvarumi dharmmamaṁ nānū rvvar prati
var . Idanaḷida sāsirvvar brāhmaṇaruma sāsira ta
Below this are engraved the following two lines in big letters of the 12th century
ḷa gelida vimānada puṁjadagaḷiya dakṣiṇe Eṇe
�maṁ dēvāra śrikaryake koṭaru halaruṁ || ma sāsira kavileyuma naḷida pātakanakku .
Digital edition of SII 11.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
